# Ultima IV dungeon: wrong
# SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH — 8 levels of 8x8 (nibble-coded), then the room-data block.
# format: ascii-dungeon v1  size=8 levels=8
# legend (char  hex  kind):
#   ~  00  corridor
#   !  10  ladder_up
#   $  20  ladder_down
#   %  40  chest
#   &  70  fountain
#   '  80  field
#   (  90  room
#   )  91  room_1
#   *  a0  altar
#   +  a1  altar_1
#   ,  a3  altar_3
#   -  b0  door_special
#   .  c0  kind_c
#   /  d0  door
#   0  d1  door_1
#   1  d2  door_2
#   2  d3  door_3
#   3  d4  door_4
#   4  d5  door_5
#   5  d6  door_6
#   6  d7  door_7
#   7  d8  door_8
#   8  d9  door_9
#   9  da  door_a
#   :  db  door_b
#   ;  dc  door_c
#   <  dd  door_d
#   =  de  door_e
#   >  df  door_f
#   ?  e0  room_marker
#   F  f0  wall
#
== level 0 ==
|F~FFF~F~|
|~!~~F~F~|
|F~F~F~FF|
|~~F~F~~~|
|FFF~F?FF|
|~~~~?$?~|
|FFFFF?F~|
|F~~~~~F~|
== level 1 ==
|FFF~F~F~|
|F)F~~~F~|
|F.F.FFF~|
|~~F)F$F~|
|F~FFF/FF|
|~~F$0!~~|
|FFFFF~FF|
|~~~~F~F~|
== level 2 ==
|FFFFFFFF|
|F$~~F$~~|
|FFF~FFF~|
|F~~~F!F~|
|F~FFF~~$|
|F.F!F?FF|
|F~F~F~F&|
|F~~~F~~~|
== level 3 ==
|FFFFFFF%|
|F!~~~!F%|
|FFF.FFF%|
|F~~~~~F%|
|F~F1F~F!|
|F~4$2~F%|
|F~F3F~F%|
|F~~~~~F%|
== level 4 ==
|F'F'F'F'|
|'''''''$|
|F'F'F'F'|
|''''''''|
|F'F'F'F'|
|'''!''''|
|F'F'F'F'|
|''''''''|
== level 5 ==
|FFFFFFFF|
|F~~~~~~!|
|F?F?F?F?|
|F5F6F7F8|
|F+F,F*F+|
|F+F,F*F+|
|F+F)F)F+|
|F$F&F&F$|
== level 6 ==
|FFFFFFF%|
|F~~~~(F%|
|F~FF.FF%|
|F~~F$~F%|
|FF~FF.F%|
|F&~F~~F%|
|FFFF~FF%|
|F!~~9$F!|
== level 7 ==
|FFF~FFFF|
|~>F~.~~~|
|FFFFFFFF|
|~~F>!F-:|
|F~FFFFF~|
|F~;<=~F~|
|FFFFF~F~|
|~~~~F!F~|
